hero.title: Analyze your energy performance
hero.description: Discover your home's DPE rating with AI

features.title: How does it
features.card1_text: Get detailed insights on your energy consumption.
features.card2_text: Receive advice tailored to your energy profile.
features.card3_text: Monitor your consumption and adjust your habits.

about.mission_text: EnergyHome AI guides you in transforming your home into an intelligent and energy-efficient space.
about.context_text: The Climate and Resilience Act imposes strict energy efficiency requirements. G-rated properties have been banned from rental since 2025, F-rated ones will follow in 2028.
about.approach_text: EnergyHome AI uses open ADEME data to analyze the energy performance of French homes using artificial intelligence.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Have a question about your DPE? We'll get back to you quickly.
